title: TrustForge Capability Token
description: Serialized capability grant carried across actors (TF-0004).

token_version.description: Version of the capability-token schema itself.

id.description: Stable token identifier, usable by revocations.

subject.description: Actor the grant is issued to.

constraints.description: Additional constraints attached on top of those inside `capability`.

chain.description: Delegation chain leading to this grant, root at index 0.

proof_ref.description: Optional hash reference to a proof event recording issuance.

signature.description: Signature envelope over the canonical form of this token (not verified in the foundation phase).
